title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd!
